response:
# Cheaper Alternatives to Spotlight

## Free Options
- **Alfred (Free tier)** - Similar launcher with decent features
- **Everything** (Windows) - Ultra-fast file search
- **Ulauncher** (Linux) - Lightweight app launcher
- **Cerebro** - Cross-platform launcher with plugins

## Affordable/One-time Purchase
- **Alfred** ($29) - More powerful than free version
- **LaunchBar** ($30) - macOS alternative with automation
- **Quick Search Bar** ($10-15) - Simpler macOS option

## Subscription-based (Budget)
- **Raycast** (Free/~$10/month) - Modern alternative with workflows
- **Wox** - Free, open-source for Windows
- **Synapse** - Free Windows alternative

## Integrated Options
- **Windows Search** - Built-in (improving in recent versions)
- **GNOME Activities** - Free on Linux
- **KDE Krunner** - Free on Linux

## Best Value
- **Raycast** (free tier) offers excellent features without cost
- **Alfred free version** strikes good balance
- **Everything** if you just need fast file search

**What's your OS and primary use case?** That would help narrow down the best option for you.
